title: minecraft:overworld_generation_rules
description: Controls how this biome is instantiated (and then potentially modified) during world generation of the overworld.

generate_for_climates.description: Controls the world generation climate categories that this biome can spawn for. A single biome can be associated with multiple categories with different weightings.

hills_transformation.description: What biome to switch to when converting to a hilly biome.

mutate_transformation.description: What biome to switch to when converting to a mutated biome.

river_transformation.description: What biome to switch to when converting to a river biome (if not the Vanilla 'river' biome).

shore_transformation.description: What biome to switch to when adjacent to an ocean biome.

weighted_climate_categories.description: An array of exactly two elements. The first element is a climate category string ('medium', 'warm', 'lukewarm', 'cold', or 'frozen'). The second element is a positive integer for how much that entry is weighted relative to other entries.

weighted_biome_name.title: WeightedBiomeName
weighted_biome_name.description: Can be a biome identifier string, or a 2-element array [biome_identifier, weight]. If no weight is provided, a weight of 1 is used.

oneOf.description: A biome and its weight [biome_identifier, weight].

prefixItems.description: Weight for this biome (relative to other weights).

items.description: Weight for this biome (relative to other weights).

weighted_biome_names.description: Can be just the identifier of a Biome, or an array of any size. If an array, each entry can be a Biome identifier string, or a 2-element array [biome_identifier, weight]. If no weight is provided, a weight of 1 is used.
